title: Rubrics, Model Judges, Pairwise Comparison, Human Calibration, and Uncertainty · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers rubrics, model judges, pairwise comparison, human calibration, and uncertainty into a changed calibrated mixed-method evaluation board. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of calibrated mixed-method evaluation board with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress thr…
objectives: Define observable task-specific criteria, anchors, critical failures, accessibility, safety, evidence, and scoring aggregation before viewing candidate outputs.
Blind model, prompt, provider, and treatment identity; randomize order; use pairwise comparison when it improves judgment reliability.
Measure repeatability, position effects, rubric sensitivity, reference leakage, adversarial manipulation, and judge-version drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Eval Precedence Uncertainty
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty-yu1f8b" that uses case 8790 to use task-specific rubrics, blinded comparisons, judge variance tests, human calibration, disagreement review, and uncertainty escalation. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty-yu1f8b
# Competency: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty.
# Case 8790: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries.
def evidence_agentpy_eval_precedence_uncertainty_yu1f8b(rubric_cases: int = 60, blinded_cases: int = 60, human_calibration_cases: int = 18, disagreement_cases: int = 7, silent_overrides: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_yu1f8b = "yu1f8b-b8f1uy-8790"
    assert evidence_variant_yu1f8b
    evidence_axes_yu1f8b = (
        "authorityyu1f8b",
        "interaction8790",
        "toolb8f1uy",
        "stateyu1f8b8790",
        "evaluation8790yu1f8b",
        "recoveryb8f1uy8790",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_yu1f8b)) == 6
    if rubric_cases < 30 or blinded_cases != rubric_cases:
        return False, blinded_cases, "rubric-blinding"
    if human_calibration_cases < 12:
        return False, human_calibration_cases, "human-calibration"
    if disagreement_cases < 1:
        return False, disagreement_cases, "judge-disagreement"
    if silent_overrides > 0:
        return False, silent_overrides, "silent-judge-override"
    assert blinded_cases == rubric_cases and silent_overrides == 0
    return True, human_calibration_cases, "calibrated-agent-judgment"
